text.title: ImagePromptBuilder and Image-to-Image Cycle
text.summary: ImagePromptBuilder fluent API with style/lighting/composition/technical fields; describe-then-generate cycle via GPT-4o Vision.

section.title: ImagePromptBuilder
section.p: ImagePromptBuilder assembles prompts from typed components: subject, style, lighting, composition, mood, details, and technical specs. Using typed components instead of ad-hoc strings ensures consistent prompt structure across a pipeline.

example.code: prompt = ( ImagePromptBuilder() .set_subject("a futuristic city skyline at sunset") .set_style("digital_art") # digital art, vibrant colors .set_lighting("golden_hour") # golden hour lighting, warm tones .set_mood("hopeful") .add_detail("flying cars") .add_detail("glass buildings") .add_technical("8k") # 8K resolution, extremely detailed .add_technical("cinematic") # cinematic composition, film grain .build() ) # style options: photorealistic, digital_art, oil_painting, watercolor, # anime, 3d_render, sketch, minimalist # lighting options: golden_hour, studio, dramatic, soft, neon, natural # technical options: 4k, 8k, depth_of_field, wide_angle, macro, cinematic

rule.statement: Use style="natural" for product photography and style="vivid" for artistic/marketing content.
rule.rationale: DALL-E 3 "vivid" hyper-saturates colors and exaggerates features — inappropriate for commercial product images that must match reality.

section.title: Image-to-Image Cycle
section.p: The describe-then-generate cycle uses GPT-4o Vision to generate a detailed description of an existing image, then feeds that description as a generation prompt. Output is loosely related, not a precise variation.

example.note: The reimagine cycle produces a loosely-related image, not a precise variation. Manage expectations when using for brand assets.
